title: 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE - 211info
text: LINES FOR LIFE 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis line that offers intervention services, connections to resources around substance use disorders, medical resources, and other supports. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Individuals who are experiencing symptoms of distress, including but not limited to suicidal thoughts Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 988 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline 988 Alternate (800) 273-8255 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CONSTRUCTION CARELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MILITARY HELPLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIOR LONELINESS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTHLINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINES FOR LIFE
